params.extra_check: In DevTools Network tab, check Protocol column for h3 (QUIC). Also note exact domain used for batchexecute request.

notes: CRITICAL: Check if Gemini uses HTTP/3 (h3/QUIC). In DevTools Network tab, right-click header → enable Protocol column. Report protocol (h2 vs h3) for batchexecute and StreamGenerate requests. Also report exact domain (gemini.google.com vs other).
